comment_what_is_this: This file tells Vercel how to build and serve your React frontend.
comment_place_it: Place this file inside your frontend/ folder (next to package.json).
comment_buildCommand: Runs 'vite build' which compiles your React/TypeScript into plain HTML, CSS and JS files inside a dist/ folder.
comment_outputDirectory: Tells Vercel where to find the built files after the build command runs. Vite always outputs to dist/.
comment_installCommand: Installs all your node_modules before building. Vercel runs this automatically.
comment_framework: Tells Vercel this is a Vite project so it applies the right optimisations.
